title: marshallia graminifolia subsp. tenuifolia
intro: Marshallia graminifolia subsp. tenuifolia, also known as slender grass-leaved Marshallia, is a flowering plant species within the family Asteraceae. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Marshallia graminifolia subsp. tenuifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Marshallia graminifolia subsp. tenuifolia typically involve infusions or teas made from the leaves and flowers of the plant.
